query:
SELECT tm.id, tm.name, tm.teamRole, tm.ghlUserId, tm.userId, u.name as userName, u.email, u.id as uid
FROM team_members tm 
LEFT JOIN users u ON tm.userId = u.id 
WHERE tm.tenantId = (SELECT id FROM tenants WHERE slug = 'nah' LIMIT 1)
AND tm.name LIKE '%Kyle%' OR tm.name LIKE '%Chris%'
ORDER BY tm.name;
command:
